subject: WS1.4 final type re-review dispatched
body:
Coordinator update from Luminous Threading Asteroid.

I sent the typed runtime/options and remote-context scanner fixes back to Hubble/type for final re-review. Ramanujan/assumptions and Rawls/test are already CLEAN/GO.

Keep staged set empty and hold commit-window activity until Hubble returns CLEAN/GO and I route the commit queue window.
